channel.title: Data-Modeling on Lough on Data
channel.description: Recent content in Data-Modeling on Lough on Data

item.title: Data Vault walk-through: Fifty First Data Vaults
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A talk to the UK Data Vault User Group on what went wrong (and right) across many iterations of building data vaults, and why the methodology is worth the heartache.

item.title: World Wide Data Vault Consortium 2023
item.author: connor@loughondata.com (Connor Lough)
item.description: A recap of WWDVC 2023 in Stowe, Vermont — small, international, and surprisingly star-studded for a methodology most people still haven’t heard of.
